Document Print / Xerox.description: Single counter flow for document printing and xerox work. Choose black and white or color per file.
checklist: Upload the document to print or copy
Set copies and print style for each file
Choose black and white or color per file
Mention any page range or special notes
Document Print / Xerox.notes_placeholder: Mention page range, paper size, xerox note, or any special print instruction.

Lamination.description: Card and A4 lamination options with or without print.

Ask the desk if print is also required

Electricity Bill Payment.description: Electricity bill service charge based on Rs. 20 per Rs. 1000 bill slab.
Electricity Bill Payment.notes_placeholder: Enter consumer number, bill amount, or operator notes.

Money Transfer Service.description: Money transfer service charge based on Rs. 20 per Rs. 1000 transfer slab.

Bike Rental.description: Bike rental charged at Rs. 500 per day.

Car Rental.description: Car rental charged at Rs. 15 per km.

Government Exam Form.description: Exam form filling support. Online fee is extra and should be noted separately.

Mention full sheet / half sheet / small card

Choose the number of photo copies needed
Select white or blue background if required
Passport Photo Print.notes_placeholder: Mention passport office, visa type, or any crop instruction.

JPG to PDF.description: Convert one or more JPG or image files into a single PDF document.

Arrange images in the order you want in the PDF
Add any special page or naming notes if needed
